posting.jobTitle: Tile, Marble and Terrazzo Finisher Apprentice
posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee (JATC) for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2 (Syracuse)
posting.locationSummary: Syracuse, NY area; Local Union #2 jurisdiction
posting.applicationSummary: Apply in person at Local Union #2, apply online 24 hours a day during the recruitment period, or mail completed applications to the JATC. Applications must be received by April 30, 2027.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2 (Syracuse), 7705 Maltlage Drive, Liverpool, NY 13090
posting.applicationMailingAddress: Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers JATC #2 (Syracuse), 7705 Maltlage Drive, Liverpool, NY 13090
posting.applicationHours: Mondays through Fridays, 8:00 p.m. to 4:00 p.m., excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 17 years old.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must reside within the geographic jurisdiction of Local Union #2 for at least six months before applying. Counties: Albany, Cayuga, Clinton, Columbia, Schenectady, Schoharie, Warren, Washington, Greene, Rensselaer, Fulton, Hamilton, Montgomery, Saratoga, Essex, Franklin, Herkimer, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Oneida, Onondaga, Oswego, and St. Lawrence.
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.classRequirement: Must attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 17 years old.
Must be physically able to lift 50-100 pounds.
Must have reliable transportation to and from job sites and required classes at the approved school.

Must reside within the geographic jurisdiction of Local Union #2 for at least six months prior to application. Counties: Albany, Cayuga, Clinton, Columbia, Schenectady, Schoharie, Warren, Washington, Greene, Rensselaer, Fulton, Hamilton, Montgomery, Saratoga, Essex, Franklin, Herkimer, Jefferson, Lewis, Madison, Oneida, Onondaga, Oswego, and St. Lawrence.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 17, able to lift 50-100 pounds, have reliable transportation, and live in Local Union #2’s jurisdiction for at least six months before applying.
posting.contactName: JATC for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2 (Syracuse)
posting.contactSummary: For more information, contact the JATC for Bricklayers & Allied Craftworkers, Local Union #2 (Syracuse) at (315) 622-2081.
